title: Fresh Crispy Chettinad Sprouts Salad
description: A monsoon‑inspired, air‑fried sprout salad packed with fiery Chettinad flavors, fresh herbs and a zesty ginger paste dressing.

ingredients.name: Mixed raw sprouts (moong & green gram)
ingredients.notes: wash and rinse thoroughly before use

ingredients.name: Mustard seeds
ingredients.notes: to be tossed in the air‑fry

instructions: Lightly toss the sliced onion and bell pepper with 1 tbsp oil, cumin seeds, mustard seeds, salt and pepper. Air‑fry for 5–6 minutes until crisp, stirring halfway. Set aside to cool slightly.
In a large bowl, combine the raw sprouts, cooled air‑fried veggies, roasted coconut flakes, mint and cilantro.
Whisk together lemon juice, ginger paste, red chili powder and a dash of salt to make the dressing. Pour over the salad and toss gently to coat.
Sprinkle the toasted coconut flakes and a sprinkling of extra black pepper on top. Serve immediately for maximum crunch.
